scripts.start: npx supabase start && docker compose up -d db alloy prometheus loki tempo grafana && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "api,ui,ai" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan,magenta" "dotnet run --project apps/api/src/PersonalFinance.Api" "npm --prefix apps/frontend run dev" "services\ai-service\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000 --app-dir services/ai-service"
scripts.start:no-api: docker compose up -d db alloy prometheus loki tempo grafana && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "ui,ai" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm --prefix apps/frontend run dev" "powershell -Command \"cd services/ai-service; .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000\""
